event.name: Pant pant
event.description: Your breath is coming hard now. How much longer will these blue-coated wretches chase you? And the sack split! You only have what you stuffed into your pockets. But you're outpacing them now. Two more streets and you'll be away.

possession.name: Shadowy
possession.availableAt: Shadowy improves as you attempt Shadowy tasks - you can improve it faster by spending Hastily Scrawled Warning Notes at your Lodgings.

messages.tooltip: 68 change points, 2 more needed to reach level 196.

messages.message: You succeeded in a Shadowy challenge! (Simple challenges mean you don't learn so much.)

possession.name: Shard of Glim
possession.description: Commonplace The jewels of the Unterzee! Or possibly shards of phosphorescent insect chitin. Authorities differ.

messages.message: You've gained 101 x Shard of Glim (new total 6,914).
messages.tooltip: Commonplace The jewels of the Unterzee! Or possibly shards of phosphorescent insect chitin. Authorities differ.

possession.name: The Airs of London
possession.description: Not every day in the Neath is the same.

messages.message: Passers-by watch you with narrow eyes. What do they see?
messages.tooltip: Not every day in the Neath is the same.
